channel.title: test on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in test on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Testing interactive functions
item.description: I’m a huge fan of unit tests, but it’s tricky to test interactive functions where the user needs to enter input before the function can progress. I used to test them manually, which is incredibly tedious and time-consuming. So I ended up not testing interative functions very thoroughly. I found a post on Stack Overflow with a useful answer by znk. I’ve expanded their answer into a full example of a unit test for an interactive function.
